title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: MORROW COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HEPPNER CLINIC VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations and some adult immunizations. Offers influenza (flu) vaccines as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 110 N Court Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 676-5421 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 676-5421 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment, walk-ins accepted FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow County SITE HOURS: Wednesday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Flu Vaccines Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MORROW COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HEPPNER CLINIC
